user.title: Set up nearby flights
user.description: The default setup shows nearby flights around your Home Assistant home location with minimal configuration. Tracked aircraft and alternate data sources are optional advanced settings.

error.at_least_one_aircraft: Add at least one aircraft identifier.
error.invalid_url: Enter a valid URL for both the feed and the map.
error.api_key_required: The official ADS-B Exchange gateway requires an API key.
error.unsupported_public_feed: The public globe aircraft.json feed is blocked. Use the official API gateway or your own aircraft.json feed.
error.no_mode_selected: Enable nearby flights or add at least one tracked aircraft.
error.opensky_radius_too_large: For the default OpenSky source, keep the nearby radius at 100 nautical miles or less.

init.title: Update nearby flight options
init.description: Adjust nearby-flight behavior, tracked aircraft, or advanced data-source settings.
